title: nicotiana tabacum f. fruticosa
intro: Nicotiana tabacum f. fruticosa, also known as a dwarf or compact tobacco plant, is a variant of the common tobacco plant (Nicotiana tabacum). This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nicotiana tabacum f. fruticosa include its ability to help with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through methods such as smoking, tea infusions, and tinctures, although caution is advised due to its potential nicotine content and toxicity.
